property.name: sun.java.command
property.value: build/sbt-launch-1.9.9.jar set every scalafmtCheck := {} set (kernelUnityCatalog / Compile / compile) := sbt.internal.inc.Analysis.empty set (kernelDefaults / Compile / compile) := sbt.internal.inc.Analysis.empty spark/testOnly org.apache.spark.sql.delta.DeltaInsertReplaceOnOrUsingDFOptionCombinationSuite -- -z "replaceWhere"

testcase.name: `replaceWhere` should be invalid with `replaceOn` option, save DataFrameWriterV1 API
`replaceWhere` should be invalid with `replaceOn` option, insertInto DataFrameWriterV1 API
`replaceWhere` should be invalid with `replaceOn` option, insertInto path-based DataFrameWriterV1 API
`replaceWhere` should be invalid with `replaceOn` option, saveAsTable DataFrameWriterV1 API

testcase.name: `replaceWhere` should be invalid with `replaceUsing` option, save DataFrameWriterV1 API
`replaceWhere` should be invalid with `replaceUsing` option, insertInto DataFrameWriterV1 API
`replaceWhere` should be invalid with `replaceUsing` option, insertInto path-based DataFrameWriterV1 API
`replaceWhere` should be invalid with `replaceUsing` option, saveAsTable DataFrameWriterV1 API
